title: Pre-registered sealed OOS validation protocol: Trend + S/R + EMA/RSI (long-only)
type: PROTOCOL ONLY - pre-registration committed BEFORE any OOS data is run. No OOS results, no OOS run, no optimization, no rule changes.

frozen_strategy_rules.accounting: R-only (1R = 2N = 2.0 * ATR20 stop distance); no compounding, no pyramiding, one position at a time, flat-state entries only
frozen_strategy_rules.support_reference: prior 20-day rolling low, lowest low over bars[i-20:i], EXCLUDES current bar (lookahead-safe)
frozen_strategy_rules.backstop: if still open at a bar CLOSE and close < EMA50, exit at that close (trend invalidation)
frozen_strategy_rules.exit_precedence_per_bar: (1) -1R hard stop intrabar -> (2) +2R target intrabar -> (3) EMA50 close-break if still open
frozen_strategy_rules.management_start: bar AFTER the fill bar (fill bar i+1 only opens; exits managed from i+2)

oos_window.status: SEALED / UNSEEN until this protocol is committed
oos_window.run_policy: run exactly ONCE after this protocol is committed
oos_window.is_files_excluded_from_oos_run: the 10 IS CSVs (2013-2022) are NOT pooled into the OOS run; OOS is judged standalone

pass_watch_fail.precedence: FAIL -> WATCH -> PASS (evaluate FAIL triggers first; any FAIL trigger forces FAIL regardless of PASS conditions)
PASS_all_must_hold: OOS max DD <= 1.5 * IS max DD (<= 15.8915 R)
at least 2 of 3 OOS years positive
result remains positive after removing top 3 winners
WATCH_any_trigger: one year dominates most of the result
max DD worse than IS but not catastrophic
FAIL_any_trigger: all or most OOS years negative
max DD > 1.5 * IS max DD (> 15.8915 R) with no recovery
result depends almost entirely on one or a few trades

interpretation_rules: PASS does NOT mean live trading.
PASS only means continue to S26-D6 entry-significance and S26-D7 Monte Carlo / sequence-risk.
WATCH means do NOT optimize; inspect the evidence and continue only if genuinely justified.
FAIL means park this branch or open a NEW branch with a fresh protocol - do NOT tune against OOS.
anti_overfit_rules: no rerunning OOS with edited rules
if changing rules, make a NEW branch with a fresh pre-registered protocol

derived_thresholds.note: oos_max_dd_pass_ceiling_r = 1.5 * IS max DD, computed and fixed here BEFORE any OOS run.

clear_line: No OOS backtest has been run. No 2023-2025 results have been viewed. This is a pre-registered protocol only. The binding PASS/WATCH/FAIL gate is this committed protocol; the S26-D5 OOS run will be judged strictly against it, exactly once.
